Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTabMixin); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self:OnLoad() self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUTHOR_HEADER;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self:InitializeSubHeading() self.subHeadingText = "Borj(amacare)";
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self:OnLoad() self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUTHOR_HEADER;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self:InitializeSubHeading() self.subHeadingText = "plusmouse";
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self:OnLoad() self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_VERSION_HEADER;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self:InitializeSubHeading() self.subHeadingText = Auctionator.State.CurrentVersion;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self:OnLoad() self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONTRIBUTE_HEADER;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationCopyAndPasteMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DONATE; self.copyText = "https://linktr.ee/plusmouse"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONTRIBUTE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONTRIBUTE_TOOLTIP_TEXT;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self:OnLoad() self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_ENGAGE_HEADER;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationCopyAndPasteMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DISCORD; self.copyText = "https://discord.gg/JabzHmzjWF"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DISCORD_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DISCORD_TOOLTIP_TEXT;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationCopyAndPasteMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_BUG_REPORT; self.copyText = "https://github.com/TheMouseNest/Auctionator/issues"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_BUG_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_BUG_TOOLTIP_TEXT;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self:OnLoad() self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_HEADER;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\deDE"; self.translators = "flow0284, SunnySunflow"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_GERMAN;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\ptBR"; self.translators = "maylisdalan, Magnuss_lm"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_BRAZIL_PORTUGUEUSE;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\zhCN"; self.translators = "sugymaylis, LvWind, 枫聖御雷"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_SIMPLIFIED_CHINESE;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\zhTW"; self.translators = "RainbowUI, BNS333"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_TRADITIONAL_CHINESE;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\esES"; self.translators = "sugymaylis, NuluT, Franxavis"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_SPANISH;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\esMX"; self.translators = "sugymaylis, NuluT, ftg3"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_LATIN_SPANISH;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\frFR"; self.translators = "Prissti, Tulsow, Korthen"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_FRENCH;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\itIT"; self.translators = "faniel80, nimaus12"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_ITALIAN;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\koKR"; self.translators = "Vee, netaras"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_KOREAN;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\ruRU"; self.translators = "ZamestoTV"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_RUSSIAN;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\trTR"; self.translators = "Serdar Çoban-Hellßringer"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_TURKISH_INFO;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self:OnLoad() self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\roRO"; self.translators = "Radu Ursache"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_ROMANIAN_INFO;
self.dynamicResizeMinWidth = 40; DynamicResizeButton_Resize(self) Mixin(self, AuctionatorScanButtonMixin); self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_FULL_SCAN_TOOLTIP_TEXT;
Mixin(self, AuctionatorFullScanStatusMixin); self:OnLoad()
self.dynamicResizeMinWidth = 40; DynamicResizeButton_Resize(self)
